name._value: In search of Wing the Fairy

0._value: I wonder how #p407#'s doing with the flying balloon... Maybe I should go check up on him in #m10003000#.

1._value: Icarus failed to make the flying balloon, but his never-ending quest for flight continues. This time he wants to deviate from a scientific approach to flight and opt for a magical approach, and asks me to see his best friend #b#p309##k in #m10002000#, the town of fairies. Apparently #p309# knows how to make #b#t4031079##k... I'll need to see that fairy in #m10002000# for #p407#'s sake.

2._value: #p309# in #m10002000# seemed to dislike humans so much that he wouldn’t even listen to what I had to say.

0._value: Hey, you're the one that got me the materials for the flying balloon...\r\n#L0##bDid you get it to work?#k

1._value: Oh, that... well... I faced MINOR, I mean, MIIINOR technical difficulties, and... well I don't know what's wrong!! Is it really an impossible dream to realize? All I wanted to do was to fly! I can't let this deter me from my ultimate goal! I can't be giving up this soon. Can you help me out one last time?

0._value: I knew you'd help me out. I really appreciate it! Anyway, I have a fairy friend, and his name is #p309#. He lives in #m10002000#, so it's hard to see him frequently, but we're still really close.

1._value: Since he is a fairy, I'm sure he knows a way to make me fly. Please find out what #b#p309##k has to offer in terms of me flying! Since I'm a long way from #m10002000#, I don't think I can go there myself. Can you go there for me and ask?

0._value: Even you have a hard time trusting me now... seriously, this one is FOR REAL! Why can't you trust me?

1._value: You're just like everyone else living in a box. Wake up, think outside the box! You'll see... you'll see me flying around here some day.

0._value: What business does a human have with me? Don’t bother me—I don’t want to waste my time.
